title: What is the best shot in Evangelion
display_title: What is the best shot in Evangelion
wikitext:
[]: What is the best shot in Evangelion?             Quote Post by bluebirdh » Fri May 13, 2022 5:11 am The scenes in much of evangelion are undeniably gorgeous and their power is only emphasised within the context of the story. The colour palettes have always been aesthetically pleasing, from the fight scenes to the stills. I know there are definitely some screen-saver worthy shots (i even have one as my own) and some spring to mind, but i was wondering what people who may of watched Eva in more detail might think - what's the best shot in all of evangelion?

[]: Re: What is the best shot in Evangelion?             Quote Post by kuribo-04 » Fri May 13, 2022 7:01 am There's so many candidates I'd go insane trying to choose one. The last shot of EoE comes to mind.

[]: Re: What is the best shot in Evangelion?             Quote Post by EvaChero » Fri May 13, 2022 8:49 am there is no chance I could even narrow it down to 10 best shots....and "best" might not be the best adjective. Unit 02 impaled by the Mass Produced Eva's is like a millstone around my neck and i see it when I close my eyes and am filled with negative feelings.

[]: Re: What is the best shot in Evangelion?             Quote Post by dzzthink » Fri May 13, 2022 2:07 pm my thumbnail. Just kidding, probably something to do with the Giant Lilith at the EoE

[]: Re: What is the best shot in Evangelion?             Quote Post by nerv bae » Mon May 16, 2022 11:10 am

[]: Re: What is the best shot in Evangelion?             Quote Post by SEELE-01 » Sat Jun 04, 2022 5:38 pm Undeniably for me: SPOILER: Show

Article: What is the best shot in Evangelion
[]: What is the best shot in Evangelion?             Quote Post by bluebirdh » Fri May 13, 2022 5:11 am The scenes in much of evangelion are undeniably gorgeous and their power is only emphasised within the context of the story. The colour palettes have always been aesthetically pleasing, from the fight scenes to the stills. I know there are definitely some screen-saver worthy shots (i even have one as my own) and some spring to mind, but i was wondering what people who may of watched Eva in more detail might think - what's the best shot in all of evangelion?

[]: Re: What is the best shot in Evangelion?             Quote Post by kuribo-04 » Fri May 13, 2022 7:01 am There's so many candidates I'd go insane trying to choose one. The last shot of EoE comes to mind.

Unit 02 impaled by the Mass Produced Eva's is like a millstone around my neck and i see it when I close my eyes and am filled with negative feelings.
